diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -140,10 +140,10 @@
             x = x + residual[:, :, :, -x.size(3):]

             x = self.bn[i](x)

 

-        x = F.relu(skip)

+        x = F.relu(skip[:, :, :, -1:])

         x = F.relu(self.end_conv_1(x))

         x = self.end_conv_2(x)

         

-        x = x.squeeze(3)

-        x = x.transpose(1, 2)

+        if len(x.shape) == 4:

+            x = x.squeeze(-1)

         return x

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -86,6 +86,8 @@
             

             with torch.amp.autocast('cuda'):

                 out = model(x, supports)

+                if out.shape != y.shape:

+                    raise ValueError(f"Shape mismatch: out {out.shape}, y {y.shape}")

                 loss = criterion(out, y)

                 

             scaler.scale(loss).backward()
